response.overview: Jeremy and Tom Fidgerald are two conspiracy-minded cousins ​​and beekeepers who believe the company they work for is a front for aliens who are exploiting Earth's resources. Jeremy and his cousin take action on climate change, kidnapping the company's CEO to force her to admit she's an alien and establish contact with their mothership. The short film addresses the exploitation of resources by large corporations and encourages people to take climate action, even though it's not always possible.
response.title: Asteria
